title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 03 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 03 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 03 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/04/2025
Today, DCE opened lower and rebounded slightly. The most-traded contract I2505 finally closed at 788.5, with a daily decline of 0.32%.Traders followed the market to sell goods, while steel mills' wait-and-see sentiment intensified, and inquiries were average. The market transaction atmosphere was sluggish.
